mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE status = 1) AS bookCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) AS orderCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) AS userCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM orders WHERE order_status IN (1, 2, 3)) AS totalSales

SELECT pc.category_name AS name, COUNT(b.book_id) AS value FROM category pc LEFT JOIN category cc ON cc.parent_id = pc.category_id LEFT JOIN book b ON b.category_id = cc.category_id AND b.status = 1 WHERE pc.parent_id = 0 GROUP BY pc.category_id, pc.category_name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d')
